IS 9523 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9523 : 2000 DUCTILE IRON FITTINGS FOR PRESSURE PIPES FOR WATER, GAS AND SEWAGE (First Revision)
IS 9523 : 2000.scope: This standard covers ductile iron fittings for pressure pipes used in water, gas, and sewage applications with nominal diameters from 80 to 2000 mm. It specifies requirements for mechanical joints including bolted, push-on, and flanged types, and applies to fittings that maintain overall dimensions for safety and interchangeability. The fittings are typically coated externally and internally to protect against corrosion and are suitable for fluid temperatures between 0°C and 50°C excluding frost.

IS 10292 : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF DIMENSIONAL REQUIREMENTS FOR RUBBER SEALING RINGS FOR CID JOINTS IN ASBESTOS CEMENT PIPING
IS 10292 : 1988.scope: Specifies the dimensional requirements for rubber sealing rings to be used with cast iron detachable joints conforming to IS 8794:1988 for joining asbestos cement pressure pipes conforming to IS 1592:1989. This standard covers the dimensions of rubber sealing rings having circular cross section up to 600 mm nominal diameter.

IS 10299 : 1982.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10299 : 1982 CAST IRON SADDLE PIECES FOR SERVICE CONNECTION FROM ASBESTOS CEMENT PRESSURE PIPES
IS 10299 : 1982.scope: This standard specifies requirements for cast iron saddle pieces used as service connections in asbestos cement pressure pipes. The saddle pieces must conform to IS 1592:1989 and are manufactured from cast iron with specified mechanical properties and dimensions. They are designed for installation on asbestos cement pressure pipes.

IS 12820 : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF DIMENSIONAL REQUIREMENTS OF RUBBER GASKETS FOR MECHANICAL JOINTS AND PUSH-ON JOINTS FOR USE WITH CAST IRON PIPES AND FITTINGS FOR CARRYING WATER, GAS AND SEWAGE
IS 12820 : 2004.scope: Specifies the dimensional requirements for rubber gaskets to be used in cast iron pipes and fittings for carrying water, gas and sewage. The standard defines the type of rubber, hardness, and dimensions for mechanical and push-on joints.

IS 12987 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12987 : 1991 CAST IRON DETACHABLE JOINTS FOR USE WITH ASBESTOS CEMENT PRESSURE PIPES (LIGHT DUTY)
IS 12987 : 1991.scope: Covers the requirements for cast iron detachable joints to be used with asbestos cement pressure pipes (light duty) conforming to IS 9627:1980. These joints are designed for light-duty applications and must meet specific mechanical and dimensional criteria.

IS 12988 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF DIMENSIONAL REQUIREMENTS FOR RUBBER SEALING RINGS FOR CID JOINTS FOR LIGHT DUTY AC PIPES
IS 12988 : 1991.scope: Specifies dimensional requirements for rubber sealing rings to be used with cast iron detachable joints conforming to IS: 12987:1991 for joining light duty asbestos cement pressure pipes conforming to IS: 9627:1980. These rings are for light duty applications including gas mains, water mains, and sewers.

IS 13382 : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF IS 13382 : 2004 CAST IRON SPECIALS FOR MECHANICAL AND PUSH ON FLEXIBLE JOINTS FOR PRESSURE PIPE LINES FOR WATER, GAS AND SEWAGE
IS 13382 : 2004.scope: This standard covers cast iron special fittings for mechanical and push-on joints used in pressure pipes carrying water, gas, and sewage. It specifies requirements for materials, joints, and dimensional tolerances for cast iron pipe fittings from DN 80 mm up to 1500 mm.

IS 11925 : 1986.title: SUMMARY OF IS 11925 : 1986 PITCH IMPREGNATED FIBRE PIPES AND FITTINGS FOR DRAINAGE PURPOSES
IS 11925 : 1986.scope: Covers materials, dimensions, and methods of testing for pitch impregnated fibre pipes and fittings for drainage purposes, including sub-surface drainage. The standard applies to pipes and fittings with diameters ranging from 50 to 200 mm.

IS 404 (PART 1) : 1993.title: SUMMARY OF IS 404 (PART 1) : 1993 LEAD PIPES – FOR OTHER THAN CHEMICAL PURPOSES (Third Revision)
IS 404 (PART 1) : 1993.scope: This standard specifies requirements for lead pipes intended for non-chemical purposes. These pipes are not suitable for potable water supply. The pipes must be free from defects and have uniform wall thickness, with specified chemical compositions and dimensional tolerances.

IS 3076 : 1985.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3076 : 1985 LOW DENSITY POLYETHYLENE PIPES FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES (Second Revision)
IS 3076 : 1985.scope: This standard specifies requirements for low density black polyethylene pipes used in potable water supplies with outside diameters up to 140 mm. The pipes are classified by working pressure (0.25, 0.4, 0.6, and 1.0 MPa) and must meet material, dimensional, and performance criteria for safe water transport.

IS 4984 : 1995.title: SUMMARY OF IS 4984 : 1995 HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE PIPES FOR WATER SUPPLY (Fourth Revision)
IS 4984 : 1995.scope: This standard specifies requirements for high density polyethylene pipes for water supply, covering nominal diameters from 16 mm to 1000 mm and material grades PE 63, PE 80, and PE 100. These pipes are intended for buried mains and services, both inside and outside buildings, with pressure ratings from 0.25 MPa to 1.6 MPa.

IS 4985 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF IS 4985 : 2000 UNPLASTICIZED PVC PIPES FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES (Third Revision)
IS 4985 : 2000.scope: This standard covers unplasticized PVC pipes for potable water supplies, including plain end and socket end pipes, and specifies requirements for materials, dimensions, and performance. It does not cover agricultural or casing pipes.

IS 7834 : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7834 : 1987 INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART - 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENT
IS 7834 : 1987.scope: This standard covers the general requirements for injection moulded PVC socket fittings intended for connection to unplasticized PVC pipes using solvent cement. It specifies materials, dimensions, and performance tests for these fittings used in water supply systems.

IS 7834 (PART 2) : 1987.title: INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART 2 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 45° ELBOWS
IS 7834 (PART 2) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded PVC socket fittings with solvent cement joints for water supplies, specifically for 45° elbows. It outlines laying lengths, tolerances, and socket dimensions compliant with IS 7834 (Part 1).

IS 7834 (PART 3) : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7834 (PART 3) : 1987 – INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES
IS 7834 (PART 3) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies requirements for manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of 90° elbows made from injection moulded PVC for water supplies. It covers laying length specifications and socket inside diameter compliance with IS 7834:1987 (Part 1).

IS 7834 (Part 4) : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART 4 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 90° TEES
IS 7834 (Part 4) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking for 90° tees made of injection moulded PVC for water supplies. It details laying length specifications and socket dimensions for various sizes, ensuring compliance with solvent cement joints for water supply systems.

IS 7834 (PART 5) : 1987.title: INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART – 5 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 45° TEES
IS 7834 (PART 5) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of 45° tees made of injection moulded PVC for water supplies. It details specific dimensions and tolerances for laying lengths Z and Z1 for various sizes of 45° tees. The socket length and inside diameter must comply with IS 7834 (Part 1):1987.

IS 7834 (PART6) : 1987.title: INJECTION MOULDING PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART 6 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR SOCKETS
IS 7834 (PART6) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded PVC socket fittings for water supplies, particularly focusing on socket elbow laying lengths and socket dimensions. It ensures compliance with specified tolerances for socket size and laying length, aligning with IS 7834 (Part 1):1987 for general requirements.

IS 7834 (PART 7) : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7834 (PART 7) : 1987 INJECTION MOULDED PVC SOCKET FITTINGS WITH SOLVENT CEMENT JOINTS FOR WATER SUPPLIES PART 7 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR UNIONS
IS 7834 (PART 7) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded PVC socket fittings with solvent cement joints for water supplies, particularly focusing on unions. It outlines specific dimensional tolerances for laying lengths and socket/Elbow dimensions for various sizes. The standard ensures compliance with general requirements from IS 7834 (Part 1):1987.

IS 7834 (Part 8) : 1987.title: Injection moulded PVC socket fittings with solvent cement joints for water supplies: Part 8 Specific requirements for caps
IS 7834 (Part 8) : 1987.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded PVC caps for water supplies. It covers socket caps with solvent cement joints used in water supply systems. The standard is specific to caps and refers to Part 1 for general requirements.

IS 8008 (Part 1) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8008 (PART 1) : 2003 INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR FITTINGS
IS 8008 (Part 1) : 2003.scope: This standard covers general requirements for materials, manufacture, methods of test, and inspection of all types of injection moulded HDPE pipes for potable water supplies, as referenced by IS 4984:1995. It specifies composition using PE 63/PE 80/PE 100 grades and defines fitting sizes based on pipe outside diameters. It also mandates minimum weld lengths to prevent wastage and includes performance requirements such as no localized swelling, leakage, or weeping.

IS 8008 (Part 2) : 2003.title: Summary of Injection Moulded High Density Polyethylene (HDPE) Fittings for Potable Water Supplies Part 2 Specific Requirements for 90° Bends
IS 8008 (Part 2) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded HDPE 90° bends for portable water supplies. It covers laying lengths, tolerances, and outside diameters and wall thicknesses at ends for welding, with reference to IS 8008 (Part 1):2003 for general requirements.

IS 8008 (PART 3) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 3 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 90° TEES
IS 8008 (PART 3) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded HDPE 90° tees for portable water supplies. It covers specific requirements for these fittings, including laying lengths and tolerances, and references general requirements from Part 1.

IS 8008 (PART 4) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8008 (PART 4) : 2003 INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 4 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR REDUCERS
IS 8008 (PART 4) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of injection moulded HDPE reducers for potable water supplies. It covers specific requirements for reducers with two different diameters at either end, including overall laying length tolerances and welding specifications. The standard also references general requirements for HDPE fittings in Part 1.

IS 8008 (PART 5) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 5 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR FERRULE REDUCERS
IS 8008 (PART 5) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for manufacture, dimensions, and tolerances for injection moulded HDPE ferrule reducers used in potable water supplies. It details overall laying lengths, tolerances, and material specifications for these fittings. The standard also references general requirements from Part 1 and provides specific requirements for ferrule reducers.

IS 8008 (PART 6) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 6 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR PIPE ENDS
IS 8008 (PART 6) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for manufacture, dimensions, and tolerances for injection moulded and machined HDPE pipe ends for potable water supplies. It details specific dimensions and tolerances for pipe ends with nominal diameters ranging from 20 to 1000 mm, categorized by pressure rating (PN6 and PN10). The standard also references general requirements in Part 1 for material, manufacturing, and testing methods.

IS 8008 (PART 7) : 2003.title: INJECTION MOULDED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 7 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR SANDWICH FLANGES
IS 8008 (PART 7) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and tolerances of injection moulded HDPE sandwich flanges for potable water supplies. It covers specific dimensions and tolerances for sandwich flanges used in water supply systems. The standard also references general requirements for HDPE fittings in Part 1.

IS 8360 (PART 1) : 1977.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8360 (PART 1) : 1977 FABRICATED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES
IS 8360 (PART 1) : 1977.scope: This standard covers general requirements for fabricated HDPE fittings intended for connection to HDPE pipes for potable water supplies. It specifies material, sizes, dimensions, and performance requirements for these fittings. The fittings must comply with the outside diameters and wall thicknesses of HDPE pipes as defined in IS 4984:1995.

IS 8360 (Part 2) : 1977.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8360 (PART 2) : 1977 FABRICATED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 2 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 90° TEES
IS 8360 (Part 2) : 1977.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for manufacture, dimensions, tolerances, and marking of fabricated HDPE 90° tees for potable water supplies. It details laying lengths, wall thickness requirements, and compliance with pipe specifications. The standard is part of a broader set covering HDPE fittings for potable water systems.

IS 8360 (Part 3) : 1977.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8360 (PART 3) : 1977 FABRICATED HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE (HDPE) FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 3 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 90° BENDS
IS 8360 (Part 3) : 1977.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and tolerances of fabricated HDPE 90° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines the laying lengths, wall thicknesses, and overall laying lengths for various sizes of bends, ensuring compliance with IS 8360 (Part 1):1977 for material and general requirements.

IS 10124 (PART 1) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENTS (First Revision)
IS 10124 (PART 1) : 1988.scope: This standard covers general requirements for materials, sizes, methods of test, and inspection of fabricated PVC fittings for potable water supplies, specifically for pipes covered in IS 4985:1988, with fittings sized from 63 to 315 mm. It specifies material conformity to IS 4985:2000 and includes socket dimensions, tolerances, and hydraulic test requirements.

IS 10124 (PART2) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART2) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 2 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR SOCKETS
IS 10124 (PART2) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC sockets for potable water supplies. It outlines material, size, testing, and sampling criteria that conform to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988. The standard details specific requirements for sockets categorized by working pressure class.

IS 10124 (PART 3) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR PORTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 3 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR STRAIGHT REDUCER
IS 10124 (PART 3) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC straight reducers for portable water supplies. It defines the dimensions and wall thicknesses for different sizes and pressure classes, ensuring conformity with IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988. The reducers are designed for use in portable water supply systems.

IS 10124 (PART 4) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 4 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR CAPS
IS 10124 (PART 4) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC caps for potable water supplies. It outlines general requirements for materials, sizes, testing, and conformity to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988. The caps are designed for different pressure classes and must be marked with color codes indicating their class.

IS 10124 (Part 5) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 5) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR PORTABLE WATER SUPPLIES
IS 10124 (Part 5) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC equal tees for portable water supplies. It defines materials, sizes, and test methods for conformity to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988. The standard covers equal tees designed for different working pressures (0.4 MPa, 0.6 MPa, 1.0 MPa) and includes dimensional tables and marking color codes.

IS 10124 (PART 6) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 6) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 6 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR FLANGED TAIL PIECES WITH METALLIC FLANGES
IS 10124 (PART 6) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC flanged tail pieces with metallic flanges for portable water supplies. It defines the materials, sizes, and conformity criteria for these fittings, ensuring they meet specified pressure classes and design features.

IS 10124 (PART 7) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 7) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTINGS FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES
IS 10124 (PART 7) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC threaded adapters for potable water supplies. It covers the general requirements for sizes, methods of test, and sampling for conformity to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988. The standard applies to threaded adapters designed for different pressure classes.

IS 10124 (Part 8) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 8) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTING FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 8 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 90° BENDS.
IS 10124 (Part 8) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 90° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material, size, and test criteria conforming to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988, and provides dimensional tables for different pressure classes. The standard also details marking colors for different pressure classes to ensure proper identification.

IS 10124 (PART 9) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 9) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTING FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 9 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 60° BENDS
IS 10124 (PART 9) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 60° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material, size, and test criteria conforming to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988, with specific dimensions and pressure class requirements for different sizes of bends. The standard also details marking colors for different pressure classes to ensure proper identification.

IS 10124 (PART 10) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 10) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTING FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES. PART 10 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 45° BENDS.
IS 10124 (PART 10) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 45° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material specifications, testing methods, and dimensional tolerances for different pressure classes. The standard ensures conformity to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988 for fabricating these fittings.

IS 10124 (Part 11) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 11) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTING FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES. PART 11 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 30° BENDS.
IS 10124 (Part 11) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 30° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material and testing criteria conforming to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988, and provides dimensional tables for different sizes and working pressures. The standard also details color-coding for different pressure classes to ensure proper identification and usage.

IS 10124 (PART 12) : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10124 (PART 12) : 1988 FABRICATED PVC FITTING FOR POTABLE WATER SUPPLIES PART 12 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS FOR 22½° BENDS
IS 10124 (PART 12) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 22½° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material, size, and test criteria conforming to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988, and provides dimensional tables for different sizes and pressure classes. The standard also details marking colors for different pressure classes to ensure proper identification.

IS 10124 (Part 13) : 1988.title: Summary of IS 10124 (Part 13) : 1988 Fabricated PVC Fitting for Potable Water Supplies Part 13 Specific Requirements for 11¼° Bends
IS 10124 (Part 13) : 1988.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for the manufacture, dimensions, and marking of fabricated PVC 11¼° bends for potable water supplies. It outlines material, size, and test criteria conforming to IS 10124 (Part 1): 1988, and provides dimensional tables for different pressure classes. The standard also details marking colors for different pressure classes to ensure proper identification.

IS 12818 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12818 : 1992 UNPLASTICISED PVC SCREEN AND CASING PIPES FOR BORE/TUBE WELL (First Revision)
IS 12818 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for ribbed, plain screen, and casing pipes made from unplasticized polyvinyl chloride (PVC) for use in bore/tubewell applications. The pipes have nominal diameters ranging from 40 to 400 mm and are designed for water supply purposes.

IS 13592 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 13592 : 1992 UNPLASTILIZED POLYVINYL CHLORIDE (UPVC) PIPES FOR SOIL AND WASTE DISCHARGE SYSTEM FOR INSIDE AND OUTSIDE BUILDINGS INCLUDING VENTILATION AND RAIN WATER SYSTEM
IS 13592 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for plain and socket end unplasticized polyvinyl chloride (UPVC) pipes with nominal outside diameters 40 mm to 160 mm for soil and waste discharge systems inside buildings including ventilation and rain water applications. The material shall consist essentially of polyvinyl chloride with additives to facilitate good surface finish, mechanical strength, and opacity under condition of use.

IS 14333 : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14333 : 1996 HIGH DENSITY POLYETHYLENE PIPES FOR SEWERAGE
IS 14333 : 1996.scope: This standard specifies requirements for high density polyethylene (HDPE) pipes used in sewerage applications, covering materials, dimensions, and performance characteristics for nominal diameters from 63 mm to 630 mm.

IS 14402 : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF GLASS FIBRE REINFORCED PLASTICS (GRP) PIPES JOINT AND FITTINGS FOR USE FOR SEWERAGE, INDUSTRIAL WASTE AND WATER (OTHER THAN POTABLE)
IS 14402 : 1996.scope: This standard covers the requirements for materials, dimensions, classification, testing and sampling of machine made pipes with glass fibre reinforced thermosetting resin with or without aggregate filler. These pipes are designed for conveying non-potable fluids such as sewage, industrial waste, river water, well water, sea water and storm water.

IS 14735 : 1999.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14735 : 1999 UNPLASTICIZED POLYVINYL CHLORIDE (UPVC) INJECTION MOULDED FITTING FOR SOIL AND WASTE DISCHARGE SYSTEM FOR INSIDE AND OUTSIDE BUILDINGS INCLUDING VENTILATION AND RAIN WATER SYSTEMS
IS 14735 : 1999.scope: This standard covers the requirements for unplasticized polyvinyl chloride (UPVC) injection moulded fittings used in soil and waste discharge systems for inside and outside buildings, including ventilation and rainwater systems. The fittings are designed to be jointed with solvent cement or elastomeric sealing rings to UPVC pipes.

IS 1239 (PART 1) : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1239 (PART 1) : 2004 STEEL TUBES, TUBULARS AND OTHER WROUGHT STEEL FITTINGS PART 1 STEEL TUBES (Sixth Revision)
IS 1239 (PART 1) : 2004.scope: This standard specifies requirements for welded and seamless plain end or screwed and socketed steel tubes intended for use in water, gas, and steam services. Medium and heavy tubes are recommended for carrying steam services. The maximum permissible pressure and temperatures for different sizes of tubes are given in Annex A.

IS 1239 (PART 2) : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS : 1239 (PART 2) 1992 STEEL TUBES, TUBULARS AND OTHER WROUGHT STEEL FITTINGS
IS 1239 (PART 2) : 1992.scope: This standard covers the requirements for butt welded and seamless steel tubulars, plain ended, screwed and socketed steel pipe fittings, and other wrought steel fittings. It specifies the designation, manufacture, chemical composition, dimensions, tolerances, and testing procedures for these components.

IS 3589 : 2001.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3589 : 2001 SEAMLESS OR ELECTRICALLY WELDED STEEL PIPES FOR WATER, GAS AND SEWAGE (168.3 TO 2540 mm OUTSIDE DIAMETER) (Third Revision)
IS 3589 : 2001.scope: This standard applies to seamless or electric fusion welded steel pipes for water, gas and sewage with outside diameters from 168.3 to 2032 mm. It covers pipes with plain or bevelled ends for butt welding or sleeve welding, but does not cover steel pipes with screwed joints and bends.

IS 4270 : 2001.title: SUMMARY OF IS 4270 : 2001 STEEL TUBES USED FOR WATER WELLS (Third Revision)
IS 4270 : 2001.scope: This standard specifies requirements for steel tubes used in water wells, including casing, drive pipe, and housing. It covers various types of joints such as screwed and socketed butt joints, screwed flush butt joints, and plain bevelled end pipes for butt welded joints.

IS 5504 : 1997.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5504 : 1997 SPIRAL WELDED PIPES (First Revision)
IS 5504 : 1997.scope: This standard covers spiral seam welded steel pipes with diameters over 457 mm and up to 2000 mm, and wall thickness up to 12.5 mm, intended for general use. The suitability for various purposes and conditions of service depends on the pipe's dimensions and properties, which must be specified in the enquiry and order.

IS 6286 : 1971.title: SUMMARY OF IS 6286 : 1971 SEAMLESS AND WELDED STEEL PIPE FOR SUB-ZERO TEMPERATURE SERVICE
IS 6286 : 1971.scope: This standard specifies requirements for seamless and electric welded steel pipes designed for conveying fluids at sub-zero temperatures. It covers four grades of steel pipe, with specific chemical, mechanical, and dimensional requirements tailored for low-temperature service.

IS 651 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 651 : 1992 SALT GLAZED STONeware PIPES AND FITTINGS (Fifth Revision)
IS 651 : 1992.scope: This standard covers dimensions and performance requirements for salt glazed stoneware pipes and fittings, including straight pipes, taper pipes, bends, junctions, half-section channels, straight channel interceptors, gully traps, and inspection pipes. The pipes are grouped into two sections: Section A for straight pipes and fittings used in pipe lines, and Section B for fittings used in common applications but not forming part of the pipe line.

IS 3006 : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3006 : 1979 CHEMICALY RESISTANT GLAZED STONEWARE PIPES AND FITTINGS (Fifth Revision)
IS 3006 : 1979.scope: This standard covers chemically resistant glazed stoneware pipes and fittings, including straight pipes, bends, junctions, half-section channels, straight and taper junctions, channel interceptors, gully traps, and inspection pipes. These are grouped into two sections: Section A for pipes and fittings that form part of a normal pipe line, and Section B for hand-moulded fittings not forming part of the main line, which have less stringent dimensional requirements.

IS 771 (PART 1) : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 771 (PART 1) : 1979 GLAZED FIRE-CLAY SANITARY APPLIANCES PART 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENTS
IS 771 (PART 1) : 1979.scope: This standard covers general requirements for materials, manufacture, finish, and inspection of glazed fire-clay sanitary appliances. It specifies permissible defects, minimum thickness, glazing requirements, and performance criteria such as warpage, crazing, water absorption, and chemical resistance. The standard applies to fire-clay bodies with natural or ball clays, glazed with a uniform, high-gloss surface.

IS 771 (Part 2) : 1985.title: SUMMARY OF IS 771 (PART 2) : 1985 GLAZED FIRE-CLAY SANITARY APPLIANCES PART 2 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF KITCHEN AND LABORATORY SINKS (Third Revision)
IS 771 (Part 2) : 1985.scope: This standard lays down the pattern, sizes, construction, dimensions, and tolerances for kitchen and laboratory sinks made of fire-clay. It specifies minimum wall and bottom thicknesses and construction methods for these sinks.

IS 771 (PART 5) : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 771 (PART 5) : 1979 GLAZED FIRE CLAY APPLIANCES, PART 5 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF SHOWER TRAYS (Second Revision)
IS 771 (PART 5) : 1979.scope: This standard specifies the pattern, size, construction, dimensions, tolerances, and finish of glazed fire-clay shower trays. It outlines general requirements for materials, manufacturing, testing, and inspection methods that conform to Part 1 of the standard. The standard covers specific requirements for shower trays made of fire-clay, including size, construction, and tolerance specifications.

IS 771 (PART 7) : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 771 (PART 7) : 1981 GLAZED FIRE CLAY SANITARY APPLIANCES, PART 7 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF SLOP SINKS
IS 771 (PART 7) : 1981.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for glazed fire clay slop sinks, including their pattern, size, construction, and tolerances. It covers both wall-mounted and floor-mounted slop sinks made of fire-clay, detailing material, manufacturing, and testing requirements. The standard ensures efficient flushing through design features like integral traps and smooth surfaces.

IS 772 : 1973.title: SUMMARY OF GENERAL REQUIREMENT FOR ENAMELLED CAST IRON SANITARY APPLIANCES (Second Revision)
IS 772 : 1973.scope: This standard outlines general requirements for enamelled cast iron sanitary appliances, covering material specifications, thickness, warpage, enamelling, acid and alkali resistance, inspection rules, and marking. It applies to products like water closets and commodes, ensuring quality through defined tolerances and defect limits.

IS 773 : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 773 : 1988 ENAMELLED CAST IRON WATER-CLOSETS, RAILWAY COACHING STOCK TYPE (Third Revision)
IS 773 : 1988.scope: This standard covers requirements for enamelled cast iron water closets used in Indian Railways' coaching stock. It specifies material, workmanship, manufacture, dimensions, and finish for one-piece construction. The fixtures must be flush-mounted and include a threaded inlet horn secured to a socket union.

IS 774 : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF IS 774 : 2004 FLUSHING CISTERNs FOR WATER-CLOSETS AND URINALS (OTHER THAN PLASTIC CISTERNs) PART 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENTS
IS 774 : 2004.scope: This standard specifies the general requirements for manually-operated flushing cisterns made of non-plastic materials, including cast iron, pressed steel, and vitreous china, for use in water closets and urinals. It covers design, construction, materials, and performance criteria for high-level, low-level, and dual-flush cisterns.

IS 1726 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1726 : 1991 CAST IRON MANHOLE COVERS AND FRAMES (Third Revision)
IS 1726 : 1991.scope: This standard specifies the basic and performance requirements for cast iron manhole covers and frames intended for use in drainage and water works. It covers various grades (Light-duty, Medium-duty, Heavy-duty, Extra-Heavy-duty) suitable for different traffic conditions, including residential, commercial, and industrial areas. The standard defines types (circular, square, rectangular, lamphole) and their appropriate locations based on vehicle load and traffic volume.

IS 2326 : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2326 : 1987 AUTOMATIC FLUSHING CISTERN FOR URINALS (OTHER THAN PLASTIC CISTERN) (Second Revision)
IS 2326 : 1987.scope: This standard lays down materials, nominal sizes, construction, performance requirements, and finish for automatic flushing cisterns used for flushing urinals. It specifies requirements for cast iron, vitreous china, or enameled pressed steel cisterns. The standard covers nominal capacities of 5 and 10 litres with a tolerance of ±0.5 litres, and includes performance and endurance tests.

IS 2548 (PART 1) : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2548 (PART 1) : 1996 PLASTIC SEATS AND COVERS FOR WATER- CLOSETS, PART 1 THERMOSSET SEATS AND COVERS (Fifth Revision)
IS 2548 (PART 1) : 1996.scope: This standard specifies requirements for thermoplastic seats and covers for water closets, including materials, dimensions, finish, and performance tests. It covers both phenolic plastic (Type PF) and urea-formaldehyde (Type UF) materials for manufacturing seats and covers.

IS 2548 (PART 2) : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2548 (PART 2) : 1996 PLASTIC SEATS AND COVERS FOR WATER-CLOSETS, PART 2 – THERMOPLASTIC SEATS AND COVERS (Fifth Revision)
IS 2548 (PART 2) : 1996.scope: This standard specifies requirements for thermoplastic seats and covers for water-closets. It covers materials, dimensions, manufacturing, and performance tests for these components. The standard defines grades based on deflection characteristics and outlines dimensional tolerances for both closed and open front seats and covers.

IS 2556 (PART 1) : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF VITREOUS SANITARY APPLIANCES (VITREOUS CHINA) PART 1 GENERAL REQUIREMENTS (Third Revision)
IS 2556 (PART 1) : 1994.scope: This standard covers general requirements for vitreous sanitary appliances made from high-grade ceramicware. It specifies material composition, glazing, permissible defects, minimum thickness, tolerances, and performance tests for various types of sanitary ware including WC pans, bidets, squatting pans, urinals, wash basins, laboratory sinks, drinking fountains, flushing cisterns, and covers.

IS 2556 (Part 2) : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF VITREOUS SANITARY APPLIANCES (VITREOUS CHINA) PART 2 - SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF WASHDOWN WATER CLOSETS (Fourth Revision)
IS 2556 (Part 2) : 1994.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for patterns, construction, dimensions, finish, and marking for vitreous washdown water closets (WCs). It covers the design and performance criteria for different WC patterns, including pedestal and independent cistern types, and defines testing procedures for flushing, paper discharge, and water holding capacity.

IS 2556 (PART 4) : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2556 (PART 4) : 1994 VITREOUS SANITARY APPLIANCES (VITREOUS CHINA) PART 4 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF WASH BASINS (Third Revision)
IS 2556 (PART 4) : 1994.scope: This standard specifies the requirements, patterns, sizes, dimensions, tolerances, construction, finish, sampling, and marking provisions for vitreous wash basins. It covers specific requirements for wash basins made of vitreous china, including patterns like Flat Back and Angle Back, and details about overflow, soap holder, and pedestal design. It also addresses finish and drainage requirements for efficient use in surgical rooms and operation theatres.

IS 2556 (Part 5) : 1994.title: IS : 2556 (PART 5) : 1994 VITREOUS  SANITARY APPLIANCES

IS 2556 (PART 9) : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2556 (PART 9) : 1994 VITREOUS SANITARY APPLIANCES (VITREOUS CHINA) PART 9 SPECIFIC REQUIREMENTS OF PEDESTAL TYPE BIDETS (Fourth Revision)
IS 2556 (PART 9) : 1994.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for patterns, construction, dimensions, tolerances, finish, inspection, and marking of pedestal type bidets made of vitreous china. It covers both pedestal bidets with and without a flushing rim, defining their functional and connecting dimensions. The standard ensures uniformity and quality for these sanitary appliances.

IS 5455 : 1969.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5455 : 1969 CAST IRON STEPS FOR MANHOLES
IS 5455 : 1969.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for cast iron steps designed for manholes. It covers material specifications, dimensional tolerances, coating requirements, and load-bearing test procedures for two distinct patterns of steps.

IS 5961 : 1970.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5961 : 1970 CAST IRON GRATING FOR DRAINAGE PURPOSES
IS 5961 : 1970.scope: This standard specifies requirements for cast iron gratings used in drainage works. The gratings must be made of grey cast iron with mild steel hinge pins, free from defects like air holes and warping. They are designed for durability under heavy loads and must meet specific dimensional and coating requirements.

IS 7231 : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7231 : 1994 PLASTIC FLUSHING CISTERS FOR WATER CLOSETS AND URINALS (Second Revision)
IS 7231 : 1994.scope: This standard specifies requirements for manually operated high-level and low-level plastic flushing cisterns of capacities 5 litres and 10 litres, for water closets, squatting pans, and urinals. It covers materials, construction, operational performance, and testing procedures for these cisterns.

IS 11246 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 11246 : 1992 GLASS FIBRE REINFORCED POLYESTER RESIN (GRP) SQUATTING PANS (First Revision)
IS 11246 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for material, construction, workmanship, finish, performance, and testing for glass fibre reinforced polyester resin (GRP) squattting pans, including pourflush and compression moulded types. It covers the design, dimensions, and quality control for these sanitaryware products.

IS 778 : 1984.title: SUMMARY OF IS 778 : 1984 COPPER ALLOY GATE, GLOBE AND CHECK VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES (Fourth Revision)
IS 778 : 1984.scope: This standard specifies requirements for copper alloy gate, globe and check valves of nominal sizes 8 to 100 mm suitable for working temperatures up to 45°C and working pressure up to 16 MPa for water works purposes. The standard may be used for other fluids, but physical and chemical testing shall be done for the same fluid.

IS 781 : 1984.title: SUMMARY OF IS 781 : 1984 CAST COPPER ALLOYScrew DOWN BIB TAPS AND STOP VALVES FOR WATERSERVICES (Third Revision)
IS 781 : 1984.scope: This standard specifies requirements for copper alloy screw down bib taps and stop valves suitable for cold non-shock working pressure up to 1.0 MPa. It defines nominal sizes, materials, dimensions, finish, and testing procedures for these valves used in water services.

IS 1701 : 1960.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1701 : 1960 MIXING VALVES FOR ABLUTIONARY AND DOMESTIC PURPOSE
IS 1701 : 1960.scope: This standard covers requirements for mixing valves used in ablutionary and domestic purposes, specifying sizes, materials, manufacturing, workmanship, and testing procedures. Valves must be made of brass, leaded tin bronze, stainless steel, or suitable corrosion-resistant alloys. They are available in three nominal sizes: 15 mm, 20 mm, and 25 mm.

IS 1703 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF WATER FITTINGS COPPER ALLOY FLOAT VALVES (HORIZONTAL PLUNGER TYPE) (Fourth Revision)
IS 1703 : 2000.scope: This standard covers requirements for copper alloy float valves (horizontal plunger type) used in water supply systems, specifying materials, construction, and testing procedures for different pressure classes (high and low). It defines nominal sizes and component materials for these valves.

IS 1711 : 1984.title: SUMMARY OF SELF-CLOSING TAPS FOR WATER SUPPLY PURPOSES (Second Revision)
IS 1711 : 1984.scope: This standard covers requirements for self-closing taps with or without stuffing box, specifying nominal sizes of 15 mm and 20 mm, materials for components, design considerations, finish requirements, and tests including endurance and hydraulic pressure tests. It ensures proper operation, corrosion resistance, and durability for water supply applications.

IS 1795 : 1982.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1795 : 1982 PILLAR TAPS FOR WATER SUPPLY PURPOSES (Second Revision)
IS 1795 : 1982.scope: This standard specifies requirements for pillar taps used in water supply purposes, covering materials, construction, finish, and testing. It defines nominal sizes of 15 mm and 20 mm, and mandates materials such as cast brass, leaded tin bronze, and brass for various components. The taps must be nickel-chromium plated, capable of high polish, and withstand hydraulic pressure without leakage or sweating.

IS 2692 : 1989.title: SUMMARY OF FERRULES FOR WATER SERVICES (Second Revision)
IS 2692 : 1989.scope: This standard lays down nominal sizes and requirements regarding material, manufacture and workmanship, construction, sampling and testing of copper alloy ferrules for use on water supply mains. It specifies materials for different parts of ferrules and testing requirements for hydraulic pressure endurance. Detailed dimensions are referred to the full specification.

IS 3004 : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3004 : 1979 PLUG COCKS FOR WATER SUPPLY PURPOSES (First Revision)
IS 3004 : 1979.scope: This standard specifies requirements for plug cocks of 15 mm, 20 mm, and 25 mm nominal size with a key head, intended for use underground in water supply systems up to 1 MPa working pressure. These plug cocks are designed for various joint types including capillary solder, union and tail piece, and copper tube compression joints.

IS 3311 : 1979.title: WASTE PLUG AND ITS ACCESSORIES FOR SINKS AND WASH-BASINS
IS 3311 : 1979.scope: This standard specifies requirements for materials, manufacture, construction, testing, and finish of waste plugs and accessories for sinks and wash-basins, ensuring suitability for use in these fixtures. It covers waste plug materials, chain dimensions, and stay construction, with compliance references to other standards for specific applications.

IS 4346 : 1982.title: SUMMARY OF WASHERS FOR USE WITH FITTINGS FOR WATER SERVICES
IS 4346 : 1982.scope: This standard specifies requirements for washers used in water services, suitable for bib taps, stop valves, self-closing taps, flush valves, pillar taps, and ferrules. The washers must be made from materials that do not impart taste or toxic effects to potable water and must not corrode metal seating or affect performance and life of taps or valves.

IS 5312 (PART 1) : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5312 (PART 1) : 2004 SWING CHECK TYPE REFUX (NON-RETURN) VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES PART 1 SINGLE - DOOR PATTERN (Second Revision)
IS 5312 (PART 1) : 2004.scope: This standard specifies requirements for flanged reflux valves used in water works for single door swing check type, covering sizes from 50 to 600 mm. It details nominal pressures, materials for components, and manufacturing and testing requirements to ensure durability and performance under specified conditions.

IS 5312 (PART 2) : 1986.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5312 (PART 2) : 1986 SWING CHECK TYPE REFLUX (NON-RETURN) VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES PART 2 MULTI - DOOR PATTERN
IS 5312 (PART 2) : 1986.scope: This standard specifies requirements for flanged reflux valves of multi-door, swing check type used for water works purposes of sizes from 400 to 1200 mm. It covers valves with nominal pressure classes PN 0.6 and PN 1.0, defining the nominal size as the bore of the waterway.

IS 8931 : 1993.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8931 : 1993 COPPER ALLOY FANCY SINGLE TAPS COMBINATION TAP ASSEMBLY AND STOP VALVES FOR WATER SERVICES
IS 8931 : 1993.scope: This standard specifies requirements for materials, manufacture, workmanship, construction, dimensions, finish, and testing of chromium plated copper alloy non-rising spindle type fancy single taps, combination tap assembly, and stop valves for water services. These valves are suitable for operation from 0.1 MPa to 0.5 MPa pressure at a maximum temperature of 65°C.

IS 9338 : 1984.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9338 : 1984 CAST IRON SCREW-DOWN STOP VALVES AND STOP AND CHECK VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES (First Revision)
IS 9338 : 1984.scope: This standard specifies requirements for flanged cast iron screw-down stop valves used in water supply systems up to 45°C, covering nominal sizes from 15 to 300 mm and including globe, angle, and globe-check valve types. The valves are designed for water works purposes and must meet specified pressure and material criteria.

IS 9739 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF PRESSURE REDUCING VALVES FOR DOMESTIC WATER SUPPLY SYSTEM
IS 9739 : 1981.scope: This standard covers pressure reducing valves for domestic water supply systems with a maximum inlet pressure of 1.7225 MPa, specifying materials, construction, and performance requirements for valves of different sizes. Valves must be self-contained, direct-acting, and include integral or separate strainers. The standard defines nominal sizes, materials for components, and performance criteria including hydrostatic testing and pressure deviation.

IS 9758 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9758 : 1981 FLUSH VALVES AND FITTINGS FOR WATER CLOSETS AND URINAL
IS 9758 : 1981.scope: This standard specifies requirements for flush valves, flush pipes, and stop valves used in water closets and urinals. It covers materials, nominal sizes, manufacturing, performance, and finish specifications for these fittings. The standard ensures durability, proper discharge rate, and corrosion resistance for sanitary applications.

IS 9762 : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9762 : 1994 POLYETHYLENE FLOATS (SPHERICAL) FOR FLOAT VALVES (First Revision)
IS 9762 : 1994.scope: This standard specifies requirements for polyethylene spherical floats suitable for float valves of nominal sizes 15, 20, 25, 32, 40, and 50 mm. The floats are made from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) conforming to IS 7328:1992, with permissible rework material not exceeding 10 percent. Designations include HP 25 for high pressure and LP 40 for low pressure applications.

IS 9763 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9763 : 2000 PLASTIC BIB TAPS, PILLAR TAPS, ANGLE VALVES FOR HOT AND COLD WATER SERVICES (Second Revision)
IS 9763 : 2000.scope: This standard specifies requirements for plastic bib taps, pillar taps, and angle valves for hot and cold water services, covering materials, dimensions, construction, and testing procedures. It ensures these components are suitable for use in plumbing systems with specified pressure and temperature limits.

IS 12234 : 1988.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12234 : 1988 PLASTIC EQUILIBRIUM FLOAT VALVES FOR COLD WATER SERVICES
IS 12234 : 1988.scope: This standard specifies requirements for plastic equilibrium float valves used in cold water services such as coolers, flush tanks, and overhead tanks. It covers size, materials, construction, and performance tests for valves designed to operate at temperatures up to 45°C. The valves must meet hydraulic and shut-off test criteria, anti-siphonage provisions, and endurance requirements.

IS 13049 : 1991.title: DIAPHRAGM TYPE (PLASTIC BODY) FLOAT OPERATED VALVES FOR COLD WATER SERVICES
IS 13049 : 1991.scope: Specifies materials, workmanship, performance and sampling requirements for diaphragm type float operated valves for water services up to 45°C for use in flush tanks, overhead water tanks, etc.

IS 13114 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF IS 13114 : 1991 FORGED BRASS GATE, GLOBE AND CHECK VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES
IS 13114 : 1991.scope: This standard specifies requirements for forged brass gate, globe and check valves suitable for working temperatures up to 45°C and non-shock maximum hydraulic working pressure of 2 MPa for water works purposes. The valves are designed for use in water works applications and include specific material, dimensional, and testing requirements.

IS 13349 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 13349 : 1992 SINGLE FACED CAST IRON THIMBLE MOUNTED SLUICE GATES
IS 13349 : 1992.scope: Covers single faced vertically sliding type cast iron sluice gates of nominal sizes from 300 to 2500 mm, suitable for mounting on the flange of cast iron wall thimble. These sluice gates are designed for either seating head or unseating head or both, and are meant for water supply and waste water application.

IS 14846 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14846 : 2000 SLUICE VALVES FOR WATER WORKS PURPOSES (50 TO 1200 MM SIZE)
IS 14846 : 2000.scope: This standard covers requirements for non-rising stem type sluice valves from 50 to 1200 mm sizes used for water supply up to 45°C with double flanged ends for connections. It specifies nominal pressures, materials, manufacturing, and testing procedures for these valves used in water works purposes.

IS 779 : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 779 : 1994 WATER METERS (DOMESTIC TYPE) (Sixth Revision)
IS 779 : 1994.scope: This standard covers terminology, construction, and technical characteristics of domestic water meters with threaded end connections of size up to and including 50 mm, suitable for measuring cold potable water at a nominal pressure of 1 MPa. It applies to both semipositive (piston type) and inferential (turbine type) meters, including magnetic type.

IS 2104 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2104 : 1981. WATER METER BOXES (DOMESTIC TYPE) (First Revision)
IS 2104 : 1981.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for materials, dimensions, and construction of domestic water meter boxes conforming to IS 779-1994. It covers two sizes suitable for water meters of nominal sizes 15, 20, 25 mm (Size 1) and 40, 50 mm (Size 2). The boxes must be constructed from cast iron, mild steel, or precast reinforced concrete, with specified minimum wall thicknesses.

IS 2373 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2373 : 1981 WATER METERS (BULK TYPE) (Third Revision)
IS 2373 : 1981.scope: This standard covers bulk type water meters, specifically vane-wheel and helical types, with nominal sizes ranging from 50 mm to 500 mm. It defines the ranges of registration, capacity ratings, minimum starting flow, and performance requirements for these meters.

IS 204 (PART 1) : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF TOWER BOLTS PART 1 FERROUS METALS (Fifth Revision)
IS 204 (PART 1) : 1991.scope: This standard specifies requirements for tower bolts made of ferrous metals. It covers various types including barrel, semi-barrel, riveted or spot welded, and skeleton tower bolts. The standard defines materials, dimensions, and finish specifications for these bolts.

IS 205 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 205 : 1992 NON FERROUS METAL BUTT HINGES (Fourth Revision)
IS 205 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for butt hinges made from non-ferrous metals, including extruded and cast brass, sheet brass, and aluminum alloy. It covers types, materials, dimensions, tolerances, number of knuckles, screw hole specifications, and workmanship and finish requirements for these hinges.

IS 206 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 206 : 1992 TEE AND STRAP HINGES (Fourth Revision)
IS 206 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mild steel Tee and strap hinges commonly used in general building construction. It covers different weight categories and sizes for both Tee and Strap hinges, along with material specifications and finish options.

IS 208 : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF IS 208 : 1996 DOOR HANDLES (Fifth Revision)
IS 208 : 1996.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for materials, manufacture, dimensions, and finish of door handles commonly fixed to doors. It covers different types of door handles including cast, pressed oval, pressed half oval, and fabricated types. The standard defines material categories and finish options for each type.

IS 281 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF IS 281 : 1991 MILD STEEL SLIDING DOOR BOLTS FOR USE WITH PADLOCKS (Third Revision)
IS 281 : 1991.scope: This standard covers mild steel sliding door bolts used for locking doors and gates with padlocks. It specifies materials, dimensions, manufacturing, and finish requirements for plate and clip or bolt types. The bolts are commonly used in general building construction.

IS 362 : 1991.title: SUMMARY OF IS 362 : 1991 PARLIAMENT HINGES (Fifth Revision)
IS 362 : 1991.scope: This standard specifies requirements for materials, manufacture, finishing, marking, and packing of parliament hinges. It covers different types including cast brass, pressed mild steel/aluminium alloy, and fabricated extruded aluminium alloy. The standard defines dimensions, tolerances, and finish specifications for various hinge sizes.

IS 363 : 1993.title: SUMMARY OF IS 363 : 1993 HASPS AND STAPLES (Fourth Revision)
IS 363 : 1993.scope: This standard covers the requirements for materials, manufacture, dimensions, and finish of hasps and staples used in building applications. It specifies types, sizes, and finish options for mild steel, brass, and aluminium alloy products. The standard is intended for use in the construction industry for securing doors and windows.

IS 452 : 1973.title: SUMMARY OF IS 452 : 1973 DOOR SPRING RAT-TAIL TYPE (Second Revision)
IS 452 : 1973.scope: This standard covers requirements for materials, dimensions, manufacture, finish, and tests for door springs, specifically the rat-tail type, commonly used in building construction.

IS 1019 : 1974.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1019 : 1974 RIM LATCHES (Second Revision)
IS 1019 : 1974.scope: This standard specifies requirements for material, dimensions, manufacture and finish of rim latches for general use. It covers handling of latches for left and right hand doors, with different types based on operation direction. Sizes are standardized at 75, 100, and 150 mm overall length.

IS 1341 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF STEEL BUTT HINGES (Sixth Revision)
IS 1341 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mild steel butt hinges, including material, dimensions, manufacture, and finish. It covers different types and sizes of hinges, with detailed tolerances and finish specifications.

IS 1823 : 1980.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1823 : 1980 FLOOR DOOR STOPPERS (Third Revision)
IS 1823 : 1980.scope: This standard specifies requirements for floor door stoppers suitable for use with door shutters of 30, 35, 40, and 45 mm thickness. It covers materials, dimensions, tolerances, manufacturing, and finish specifications for these stoppers.

IS 2209 : 1976.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2209 : 1976 MORTICE LOCKS (VERTICAL TYPE) (Third Revision)
IS 2209 : 1976.scope: This standard specifies requirements for vertical type mortice locks, including size, material, manufacturing, and finish specifications. It ensures interchangeability of keys and durability through prescribed tests. The standard covers brass, steel, and aluminum alloy bodies with specific finish and performance criteria.

IS 2681 : 1993.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2681 : 1993 NON-FERROUS METAL SLIDING DOOR BOLTS (ALDROPS) FOR USE WITH PADLOCKS (Third Revision)
IS 2681 : 1993.scope: This standard specifies requirements for non-ferrous metal sliding door bolts (aldrops) used in general building construction for locking doors and gates with padlocks. It covers brass and aluminium alloy variants with different manufacturing processes and finishes.

IS 3818 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF CONTINUOUS (PIANO) HINGES (Third Revision)
IS 3818 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for continuous (piano) hinges, covering materials, dimensions, tolerances, and finish specifications for both mild steel and aluminium alloy hinges. It outlines material types for components like flap, pin, and screw holes, along with dimensional tolerances and surface treatments to ensure durability and functionality in piano hinge applications.

IS 3828 : 1966.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3828 : 1966 VENTILATOR CHAINS (Third Revision)
IS 3828 : 1966.scope: This standard specifies requirements for ventilator chains, including materials, dimensions, and manufacturing processes. It covers the use of mild steel and aluminium alloy components such as staples, eyes, and chains. The standard ensures the chains are strong enough to bear a 20 kg load without deformation.

IS 3843 : 1995.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3843 : 1995 STEEL BACK FLAP HINGES (Second Revision)
IS 3843 : 1995.scope: This standard covers types, materials, dimensions, manufacture, and finish of steel back flap hinges. It specifies requirements for light and heavy weight hinges made from steel cover plate and mild steel wire. The standard ensures proper screw hole preparation and surface finish for durability and functionality.

IS 3847 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF MORTICE NIGHT LATCHES (First Revision)
IS 3847 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mortice night latches for general use, including nominal size, materials, finish, and testing procedures. It covers two-lever latches with non-interchangeable keys for left and right-hand doors, and defines material composition for body, face plate, striking plate, and case plate. The standard also references additional specifications for testing and materials.

IS 4621 : 1975.title: SUMMARY OF INDICATING BOLT FOR USE IN PUBLIC BATHS AND LAVATORIES
IS 4621 : 1975.scope: This standard specifies requirements for indicating bolts used in public baths and lavatories. The bolts operate via gear work or displacement, showing 'ENGAGED' on red background when drawn and 'VACANT' on green background when withdrawn. They are typically made in two sizes.

IS 5187 : 1972.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5187 : 1972 FLUSH BOLTS (First Revision)
IS 5187 : 1972.scope: This standard specifies requirements for flush bolts used in cupboards and doors. It covers materials, dimensions, tolerances, and finish specifications for different types of flush bolts. The bolts are designed for easy assembly and proper functioning within the spring mechanism.

IS 5899 : 1970.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5899 : 1970 BATH ROOM LATCHES
IS 5899 : 1970.scope: This standard specifies requirements for materials, size, and finish of bathroom latches. It covers the body, bolts, and knob components made from various alloys and extrusions. The standard defines dimensions and material options for manufacturing bathroom latches.

IS 5930 : 1970.title: SUMMARY OF IS 5930 : 1970 MORTICE LATCH (VERTICAL TYPE)
IS 5930 : 1970.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mortice latches used on doors such as bathroom doors, W.C. doors, and private room doors. The latches are available in sizes 65, 75, and 100 mm, with strict dimensional tolerances and material compliance. They must operate smoothly and withstand specified mechanical tests.

IS 6315 : 1992.title: SUMMARY OF IS 6315 : 1992 FLOOR SPRINGS (HYDRAULICALLY REGULATED) FOR HEAVY DOORS (Second Revision)
IS 6315 : 1992.scope: This standard specifies requirements for hydraulically regulated concealed type floor springs used in vertical heavy doors weighing not more than 125 kg per leaf. It covers construction, material, performance, and finish specifications for these springs, ensuring durability and ease of operation under specified conditions.

IS 6318 : 1971.title: SUMMARY OF IS 6318 : 1971 PLASTIC WINDOW STAYS AND FASTENERS
IS 6318 : 1971.scope: This standard specifies the performance and functional requirements for window stays and fasteners made of polypropylene. It outlines material properties and test methods to ensure durability and functionality in restraining window shutters. The standard covers both the physical dimensions and mechanical performance criteria for these plastic components.

IS 6343 : 1982.title: SUMMARY OF IS 6343 : 1982 DOOR CLOSERS (PNEUMATICALLY REGULATED) FOR LIGHT DOORS WEIGHING UPTO 40 KG
IS 6343 : 1982.scope: This standard specifies requirements for pneumatically regulated door closers designed for light doors weighing up to 40 kg. It covers materials, dimensions, general requirements, performance, and finish specifications for these closers. The closers must operate smoothly, withstand temperature variations, and meet endurance and leakage test criteria.

IS 6607 : 1972.title: SUMMARY OF IS 6607 : 1972 REBATED MORTICE LOCKS (VERTICAL TYPE)
IS 6607 : 1972.scope: This standard specifies requirements for rebated mortice locks suitable for use on double leaf doors with rebated meeting stiles. It covers sizes, non-interchangeability of keys, body and locking bolt dimensions, mechanism type, and finish specifications for vertical type locks.

IS 7196 : 1974.title: Summary of IS 7196 : 1974 Hold Fast
IS 7196 : 1974.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mild steel hold fasts used in wooden doors and window frames. The hold fasts must be manufactured from mild steel flats not less than 5 mm thick, free from burrs or dents, and finished with a coat of bitumen and sanded. Detailed specifications are referenced to IS 7196:1974.

IS 7197 : 1974.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7197 : 1974 DOUBLE ACTION FLOOR SPRINGS (WITHOUT OIL CHECK) FOR HEAVY DOORS
IS 7197 : 1974.scope: This standard specifies requirements for concealed type floor springs without oil check for vertical heavy doors weighing not more than 125 kg per leaf. It covers materials, construction, dimensions, and performance criteria for double action floor springs used in heavy doors.

IS 7534 : 1985.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7534 : 1985 SLIDING LOCKING BOLTS FOR USE WITH PADLOCKS (First Revision)
IS 7534 : 1985.scope: This standard covers requirements for sliding locking bolts used with padlocks for locking doors and gates. It specifies materials, dimensions, tolerances, and finish for commonly used bolt types.

IS 7540 : 1974.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7540 : 1974 MORTICE DEAD LOCKS
IS 7540 : 1974.scope: This standard covers requirements for mortice dead locks, which have a single bolt shot and withdrawn by key from either side, providing a reasonable degree of security. These locks are suitable for occasional use in store rooms, cellars, or warehouses, and can also serve as an additional lock for doors. The standard specifies sizes, materials, manufacturing, and testing requirements for these locks.

IS 8760 : 1978.title: SUMMARY OF IS 8760 : 1978 MORTICE SLIDING DOOR LOCKS WITH LEVER MECHANISM
IS 8760 : 1978.scope: This standard specifies requirements for mortice sliding door locks with lever mechanism. It covers sizes, shape, dimensions, non-interchangeability of keys, and finish options for different body materials. The locks must be capable of being opened from both sides and meet specified tolerances and testing requirements.

IS 9106 : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9106 : 1979 RISING BUTT HINGES
IS 9106 : 1979.scope: This standard specifies requirements for rising butt hinges, covering materials, dimensions, manufacture, and finish. It defines types and materials for steel and brass hinges, including their sizes and surface finish requirements.

IS 9131 : 1979.title: SUMMARY OF IS 9131 : 1979 RIM LOCKS
IS 9131 : 1979.scope: This standard specifies requirements for materials, construction, dimensions, and finish of rim locks for single and double-leaf doors in buildings. It covers two types: left-hand or right-hand, and reversible. The locks are manufactured with non-interchangeable keys in batches of at least 24 units.

IS 10019 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 10019 : 1981 MILD STEEL STAYS AND FASTENERS
IS 10019 : 1981.scope: This standard covers the requirements for materials, dimensions, manufacture, and finish of mild steel stays and fasteners commonly used in windows. It specifies two types of stays and fasteners, made from mild steel sheets or bars, and outlines their shape, dimensional tolerances, and finish options.

IS 10342 : 1982.title: SUMMARY OF CURTAIN RAIL SYSTEM
IS 10342 : 1982.scope: This standard covers requirements for materials, manufacture, dimensions, testing, and finish of rails, runners, and hooks used in curtain rail systems. It specifies types of materials including cast brass, pressed mild steel or brass, and fabricated extruded brass or aluminium alloy. The standard does not cover drop curtain rail systems used in theaters or auditoriums.

IS 12817 : 1997.title: SUMMARY OF STAINLESS STEEL BUTT HINGES (First Revision)
IS 12817 : 1997.scope: This standard covers the types, dimensions, manufacture, and finish requirements for stainless steel butt hinges. It specifies different weight categories including light, medium, and heavy weight hinges, along with unequal flap and unequal flat hinge types. The standard ensures compliance with prescribed material grades and finish specifications.

IS 12867 : 1989.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12867 : 1989 PVC HAND RAIL COVERS
IS 12867 : 1989.scope: This standard covers PVC handrail covers for use on metal strip handrails. These covers are manufactured by extrusion using plasticized PVC compound of desired formulation and colour. They are designed to suit metallic flats of specified widths and provide a comfortable grip.

IS 14912 : 2001.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14912 : 2001 DOOR CLOSERS - CONCEALED TYPE (HYDRAULICALLY REGULATED)
IS 14912 : 2001.scope: This standard specifies requirements for hydraulically operated, concealed type door closers fixed in the thickness of a panel on a vertical, hinge-type door opening to one side only, with a maximum weight of 80 kg. It does not cover overhead type door closers, or those working on only mechanical devices.

IS 12049 : 1987.title: SUMMARY OF TOLERANCES RELATING TO WOOD BASED PANEL MATERIALS
IS 12049 : 1987.scope: Covers the dimensions, such as length, width, and thickness, for wood based panel materials. The wood based panels considered are plywood, blockboard, hardboard, fibre insulation board, particle board, veneered particle board, and high density particle board. The standard specifies sizes and tolerances for these materials.

IS 849 : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 849 : 1994 COLD SETTING CASE IN GLUE FOR WOOD (First Revision)
IS 849 : 1994.scope: This standard specifies requirements for cold setting casein glue used in the wood panel, wood work, and joinery industries. The glue must be in powder form, prepared in water to yield a homogeneous pasty fluid, and supplied in non-absorbent airtight containers. It also outlines tests for adhesive strength, mycological properties, chloride and sulphate content, and storage properties.

IS 851 : 1978.title: SUMMARY OF IS 851 : 1978 SYNTHETIC RESIN ADHESIVES FOR CONSTRUCTION WORK (NON-STRUCTURAL) IN WOOD (First Revision)
IS 851 : 1978.scope: This standard specifies requirements for synthetic resin adhesives suitable for non-structural wood work and joinery. It defines four types of adhesives based on water resistance (Boiling Water Proof, Boiling Water Resistance, Warm Water Resistance, Cold Water Resistance) and their symbols. The adhesives must meet specified test requirements for dry, boiling water, hot water, cold water, and resistance to micro-organisms.

IS 303 : 1989.title: SUMMARY OF IS 303 : 1989 PLYWOOD FOR GENERAL PURPOSE (Third Revision)
IS 303 : 1989.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for plywood used for general purposes, including different grades and types based on appearance and quality. It covers materials, defect categories, dimensions, and performance tests for plywood boards.

IS 1328 : 1996.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1328 : 1996 VENEERED DECORATIVE PLYWOOD (Third Revision)
IS 1328 : 1996.scope: This standard covers types of plywood with ornamental veneers on one or both faces used for decorative purposes such as furniture making, panelling of railway coaches, buses, and ships. It specifies grades (BWR and MR) and types (Type 1 and Type 2) for decorative plywood, including requirements for materials, dimensions, and finish.

IS 4990 : 1993.title: SUMMARY OF IS 4990 : 1993 PLYWOOD FOR CONCRETE SHUTTERING WORK (Second Revision)
IS 4990 : 1993.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for plywood used in concrete shuttering and formwork. It covers types, materials, dimensions, thickness, workmanship, and testing procedures for plywood boards designed for construction purposes.

IS 5509 : 2000.title: SUMMARY OF FIRE RETARDANT PLYWOOD (Second Revision)
IS 5509 : 2000.scope: This standard covers the fire retardant chemicals, methods of treatment, and requirements for fire retardant plywood. It specifies the types of flame retardants, preparation methods, and conditioning requirements for the treated plywood. The standard also outlines dimensional tolerances, finish requirements, and performance tests for fire resistance.

IS 5539 : 1969.title: SUMMARY OF PRESERVATIVE TREATED PLYWOOD
IS 5539 : 1969.scope: This standard covers the treatment of plywood for protection against fungi, termites, and other insects and marine borers. It specifies the types of preservatives, preparation methods, and recommended practices for different service conditions.

IS 7316 : 1974.title: SUMMARY OF IS 7316 : 1974 DECORATIVE PLYWOOD USING PLURALITY OF VENEER FOR DECORATIVE FACES
IS 7316 : 1974.scope: Covers decorative plywood with ornamental faces produced by use of plurality of veneers meant for decorative use such as interior panelling of buildings, buses, ships, etc. and for decorative furniture of all types.

IS 10701 : 1983.title: SUMMARY OF STRUCTURAL PLYWOOD
IS 10701 : 1983.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for structural plywood used in applications such as stressed skin panels, plywood web beams, sheathing, silos, and ship containers. It covers materials, dimensions, treatment, quality, and performance characteristics for structural purposes.

IS 13957 : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF METAL FACED PLYWOOD
IS 13957 : 1994.scope: Covers manufacture and requirements of metal faced plywood composite, limited to the use of galvanized iron sheet or aluminium sheet only. The dimensions and tolerances of metal faced plywood boards are specified in accordance with IS 12049:1987.

IS 1658 : 1977.title: SUMMARY OF FIBRE HARD BOARDS (Second Revision)
IS 1658 : 1977.scope: This standard covers requirements of fibre hardboards for general purposes, excluding insulation boards, wood particle boards, and similar boards. It classifies them by manufacturing method, density, and physical properties.

IS 1659 : 2004.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1659 : 2004 BLOCK BOARDS (Fourth Revision)
IS 1659 : 2004.scope: This standard specifies the essential requirements for commercial and decorative blockboards, including grades (BWP and MR), types (decorative and commercial), materials, dimensions, and testing procedures for interior and exterior uses such as flooring, furniture, and partitions.

IS 3087 : 1985.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3087 : 1985 WOOD PARTICLE BOARDS (MEDIUM DENSITY) FOR GENERAL PURPOSES (First Revision)
IS 3087 : 1985.scope: This standard specifies requirements for medium density wood particle boards for general purposes, with a specific gravity range of 0.5 to 0.9. It covers flat pressed, extrusion pressed, and extrusion tubular boards, but excludes veneered, moulded, and impregnated particle boards.

IS 3097 : 1980.title: SUMMARY OF VENEERED PARTICLE BOARDS (First Revision)
IS 3097 : 1980.scope: This standard specifies requirements for veneered particle boards, including grades (Grade I and Grade II), types (Type I to Type IV), material (medium density particle boards), and manufacturing processes. It covers dimensions, tolerances, adhesive types, and finish specifications for both general and decorative purposes.

IS 3129 : 1985.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3129 : 1985 LOW DENSITY PARTICLE BOARDS (First Revision)
IS 3129 : 1985.scope: This standard specifies the essential requirements for low density particle boards, including material composition, dimensions, tolerances, and physical properties. It covers the use of ligno-cellulosic materials and adhesives to manufacture boards with specific density and fire-retardant properties. The standard defines the manufacturing process and quality control parameters for these boards.

IS 3308 : 1981.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3308 : 1981 WOOD WOOL BUILDING SLABS (First Revision)
IS 3308 : 1981.scope: This standard specifies requirements for wood wool building slabs, including types (lightweight for non-load bearing applications and heavy-duty for load bearing), dimensions, weight, tolerances, and performance characteristics such as deflection under load, thermal conductivity, and sound absorption. It covers the use of these slabs in partitions, ceilings, wall linings, and roof insulation.

IS 3478 : 1966.title: SUMMARY OF HIGH DENSITY WOOD PARTICLE BOARDS
IS 3478 : 1966.scope: This standard specifies requirements for high density wood particle boards in flat sheet or moulded forms, categorized by resin type (BWR or MR) and grade (A or B). It covers materials, sizing, dimensions, and physical properties including density, moisture content, modulus of rupture, tensile strength, water absorption, and resistance to boiling water.

IS 12406 : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12406 : 2003 MEDIUM DENSITY FIBRE BOARDS FOR GENERAL PURPOSES
IS 12406 : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for medium density fibre boards for general purposes with a density range of 600–900 kg/m³. The boards are of one type, designated as SBG-I or SBG-II, and must be flat, uniform in thickness, and have square edges. They are intended for general use and are not applicable to veneered, laminated, or specially treated boards.

IS 12823 : 1990.title: SUMMARY OF IS 12823 : 1990 WOOD PRODUCTS-PRELAMINATED PARTICLES BOARDS
IS 12823 : 1990.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for prelaminated particle boards, including grades (Grade I and Grade II) and types (Type I, II, III, IV), for general and special applications. It covers materials, physical and mechanical properties, and test methods for these boards.

IS 14276 : 1995.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14276 : 1995 CEMENT BONDED PARTICLE BOARDS
IS 14276 : 1995.scope: This standard specifies requirements for cement bonded particle boards. It covers materials such as wood species and cement additives, and defines dimensions, tolerances, and physical properties. The standard does not cover particle boards bonded with synthetic resin adhesives.

IS 14587 : 1998.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14587 : 1998 PRE-LAMINATED MEDIUM DENSITY FIBRE BOARD
IS 14587 : 1998.scope: This standard specifies the requirements for prelaminated medium density fibre board, including grades, types, materials, physical and mechanical properties, and performance characteristics for general purposes and special applications. It covers the use of synthetic resin bonded boards with specific density, moisture content, and dimensional tolerances.

IS 3513 (PART 1) : 1989.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3513 (PART 1) 1989 : RESIN TREATED COMPRESSED WOOD LAMINATES (COMPREGS) PART 1 – FOR ELECTRICAL PURPOSE
IS 3513 (PART 1) : 1989.scope: This standard specifies requirements for resin treated compressed wood laminates (compregs) for electrical purposes. These materials are fully impregnated and high density, suitable for HV and LV electrical insulation and general mechanical purposes. The standard does not cover solid compressed wood.

IS 848 : 1974.title: SUMMARY OF IS 3513 (PART 3) 1989 : RESIN TREATED COMPRESSED WOOD LAMINATES (COMPREGS) PART 3 FOR GENERAL PURPOSES (First Revision)
IS 848 : 1974.scope: This standard specifies requirements for resin treated compressed wood laminates (compregs) for general purposes. It covers grades and types of compregs, including high density (GH) and medium density (GM), suitable for textile mills, engineering tools, and general construction. The standard does not cover solid compressed wood.

IS 14616 : 1999.title: SUMMARY OF IS 14616 : 1999 LAMINATED VENEER LUMBER
IS 14616 : 1999.scope: This standard covers laminated veneer lumber (LVL), a structural composite made by laminating veneers with suitable adhesive. It specifies requirements for materials, dimensions, defects, and performance characteristics for LVL used in structural applications such as beams, rafters, and furniture.

IS 13958 : 1994.title: IS 13958 : 1994 BAMBOO MAT BOARD FOR GENERAL PURPOSES

IS 1003 (PART 1) : 2003.title: SUMMARY OF TIMBER PANELLED AND GLAZED SHUTTERS PART 1 DOOR SHUTTERS
IS 1003 (PART 1) : 2003.scope: This standard specifies requirements for timber door shutters, including materials like timber, plywood, blockboard, and glass panels, for use in domestic buildings such as offices, schools, and hospitals. It covers aspects like construction, workmanship, finish, inspection, and testing.

IS 1003 (PART 2) : 1994.title: SUMMARY OF IS 1003 (PART 2) : 1994 TIMBER PANELLED AND GLAZED SHUTTERS PART 2 – WINDOW AND VENTILATOR SHUTTERS (Third Revision)
IS 1003 (PART 2) : 1994.scope: This standard covers requirements for timber, plywood, blockboard, and wire-gauze panels used in window and ventilator shutters for domestic buildings, offices, and schools. It specifies material, size, construction, workmanship, finish, inspection, and testing requirements for these shutters, which are typically double-leaved and may be glazed.

IS 2191 (PART 1) : 1983.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2191 (PART 1) : 1983 WOODEN FLUSH DOOR SHUTTERS (CELLULAR AND HOLLOW CORE TYPE) PART 1 PLYWOOD FACE PANELS (Fourth Revision)
IS 2191 (PART 1) : 1983.scope: This standard specifies requirements for cellular and hollow core wooden flush door shutters with plywood or cross-band face veneers. It covers types, sizes, materials, workmanship, finish, and tests for these shutters. The standard applies to shutters with face panels made from plywood or cross-band, including specifications for core types and face panel thicknesses.

IS 2191 (PART 2) : 1983.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2191 (PART 2) : 1983 WOODEN FLUSH DOOR SHUTTERS (CELLULAR AND HOLLOW CORE TYPE) PART 2 – PARTICLE BOARD AND HARDBOARD FACE PANELS
IS 2191 (PART 2) : 1983.scope: This standard covers requirements for wooden flush door shutters with particle board and hardboard face panels, including cellular and hollow core types, specifying materials, grades, construction, finishes, and tests. It addresses both veneered and unveneered panels, with detailed specifications for thickness, workmanship, and dimensional tolerances.

IS 2202 (PART 1) : 1999.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2202 (PART 1) : 1999 WOODEN FLUSH DOOR SHUTTERS (SOLID CORE TYPE)
IS 2202 (PART 1) : 1999.scope: This standard specifies requirements for solid core wooden flush door shutters with face panels of plywood or cross-band and face veneers. It covers types, sizes, material, construction, workmanship, and tests for these shutters. The standard is applicable to both single and double leaf shutters.

IS 2202 (PART 2) : 1983.title: SUMMARY OF IS 2202 (PART 2) : 1983 WOODEN FLUSH DOOR SHUTTERS (SOLID CORE TYPE) PART 2 PARTICLE BOARD AND HARDBOARD FACE PANELS (Third Revision)
